summary: Frontend-only test of new BolsaFamilia executive summary row (mini-dashboard with 3 clickable chips). Verified summary row presence + correct counts in both specific-school and all-schools modes; below/missing chips correctly disabled when count=0 (which matches current data — no <75% frequencies recorded for AY 2026). Toggle/filter/clear/empty-state branches could not be visually exercised because no student in DB has freq <75% in the tested ranges (Jan-Dec, AY 2026), but the code paths are straightforward and statically conform to spec.
critical_code_review_comments: BolsaFamilia.js is now 651 lines — still under 700-line threshold, but accumulating responsibilities (filters, summary, validation, save, PDF, render). Recommend extracting <BFSummaryRow/> and <BFStudentCard/> into dedicated components on the next iteration to keep cognitive load low.
studentFlags/summary/displayedStudents use useMemo correctly with proper deps — efficient and clean.
Summary filter is auto-reset on selectedSchool/selectedClass/monthStart/monthEnd change (line 203) ✓ as required by spec.
Disabled state on chips when count=0 correctly handled via `disabled={summary.below === 0}` with `disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed` classes ✓.
Empty-state (bf-summary-filter-empty) correctly gated on `summaryFilter !== null && displayedStudents.length === 0` ✓.
Total chip (bf-summary-total) clears any active filter by setting summaryFilter to null ✓.
Clear button (bf-summary-clear) only rendered when summaryFilter !== null ✓.
All chips and clear/empty have correct data-testids matching the spec exactly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on testable behaviors (summary row presence, counts, disabled state, all-schools mode). Toggle/filter behavior could not be visually verified due to data — code path inspected and correct.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Summary chips work but the dynamic toggle/filter/empty-state paths could not be exercised because no BF student in the current DB has a recorded frequency <75% for AY 2026 (all months show '-' frequency). To fully validate dynamic filter UI in the future, seed at least one BF student with a recorded monthly frequency below 75% OR have main agent manually verify after frequencies are imported. All static code paths match spec.

all_schools_mode_admin.school_name_per_card: rendered for cards where backend returns school_name (matches iteration_78 finding — 4/6 have school_name)

observations_during_test.filter_reset_on_month_change: Could not be exercised — below chip stayed disabled. Code inspection confirms useEffect resets summaryFilter on [selectedSchool, selectedClass, monthStart, monthEnd].
